name: archive-room-phase-7

tested.summary: Automated backend/UI syntax tests passed; chrome-devtools-mcp with --browserUrl verified real phase7 fixture UI and API.

done.summary: 用户初步验收通过，同意归档 Phase 7。

notes: Child requirement created for Archive Room Phase 7 after Phase 6 acceptance.
Product clarification completed before creation: Phase 7 prioritizes human governance of long-lived rules, high-impact suggestions, and conflicts with confirmed content.
Checklist generated and waiting for user confirmation before todolist creation.
Adjusted after user feedback: added tiered confirmation authority so source/system facts and low-risk archive-manager summaries do not all require human confirmation.
Clarified that ordinary business AI cannot self-confirm AI-processed archive content; archive-manager confirmation requires archive manager judgment.
Implementation completed and tested with backend regression tests plus chrome-devtools-mcp connected to existing VO browser via --browserUrl.
User accepted Phase 7 and requested archival on 2026-06-21.
